title: Self-Supervised Learning from Images with a Joint-Embedding Predictive Architecture
significance: Foundational image JEPA baseline; establishes the starting point for the whole literature.

title: MC-JEPA: A Joint-Embedding Predictive Architecture for Self-Supervised Learning of Motion and Content Features
significance: First major temporal extension: JEPA for motion/content disentanglement in video.

title: A-JEPA: Joint-Embedding Predictive Architecture Can Listen
significance: Early modality expansion from vision into audio.

title: CNN-JEPA: Self-Supervised Pretraining Convolutional Neural Networks Using Joint Embedding Predictive Architecture
significance: Backbone diversification beyond ViT-heavy formulations into CNNs.

title: M3-JEPA: Multimodal Alignment via Multi-gate MoE based on the Joint-Embedding Predictive Architecture
significance: Multimodal JEPA enters the literature in a dedicated form.

title: Denoising with a Joint-Embedding Predictive Architecture
significance: Generative bridge appears via denoising-oriented JEPA framing.

title: Connecting Joint-Embedding Predictive Architecture with Contrastive Self-supervised Learning
significance: The literature starts connecting JEPA to adjacent SSL theory such as contrastive learning.

title: Video Representation Learning with Joint-Embedding Predictive Architectures
significance: JEPA becomes a broader video representation-learning family, not just a single paper line.

title: ACT-JEPA: Novel Joint-Embedding Predictive Architecture for Efficient Policy Representation Learning
significance: JEPA enters policy representation learning and RL-oriented work.

title: seq-JEPA: Autoregressive Predictive Learning of Invariant-Equivariant World Models
significance: Autoregressive / sequential world-model direction becomes explicit.

title: V-JEPA 2: Self-Supervised Video Models Enable Understanding, Prediction and Planning
significance: V-JEPA 2 marks a step from representation learning toward understanding, prediction and planning.

title: Audio-JEPA: Joint-Embedding Predictive Architecture for Audio Representation Learning
significance: Audio JEPA becomes a more explicit standalone program of work.

title: LLM-JEPA: Large Language Models Meet Joint Embedding Predictive Architectures
significance: JEPA ideas move decisively into LLM territory.

title: JEPA-T: Joint-Embedding Predictive Architecture with Text Fusion for Image Generation
significance: Image-generation bridge appears through JEPA + text fusion.

title: LeJEPA: Provable and Scalable Self-Supervised Learning Without the Heuristics
significance: LeJEPA consolidates the theory/recipe turn with a cleaner and more principled training story.

title: VL-JEPA: Joint Embedding Predictive Architecture for Vision-language
significance: Vision-language JEPA becomes explicit rather than implicit or ad hoc.

title: JEPA-Reasoner: Decoupling Latent Reasoning from Token Generation
significance: Latent reasoning is framed as a first-class JEPA research direction.

title: VLA-JEPA: Enhancing Vision-Language-Action Model with Latent World Model
significance: JEPA begins to plug directly into VLA systems.

title: Causal-JEPA: Learning World Models through Object-Level Latent Interventions
significance: Object-centric causal/world-model JEPA becomes explicit and technically grounded.

title: LeWorldModel: Stable End-to-End Joint-Embedding Predictive Architecture from Pixels
significance: End-to-end JEPA world models from pixels push toward unified latent world modeling.

title: ThinkJEPA: Empowering Latent World Models with Large Vision-Language Reasoning Model
significance: JEPA starts being paired with stronger reasoning stacks for latent planning.

title: JEPAMatch: Geometric Representation Shaping for Semi-Supervised Learning
significance: Recent work returns to representation shaping, indicating the objective-design frontier remains open.
